results.rendered_html: vaiśampāyana m. (patr. fr. viśam-pa) N. of an ancient sage (teacher of the Taittirīya-saṃhitā [q.v.]; in epic poetry a pupil of Vyāsa and also the narrator of the Mahā-bhārata to Janam-ejaya),  GṛS. ;  TĀr.  &c. (cf.  IW. 371 n. 1 )
